response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with nearly two decades of software development, including recent full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq — a rare and directly relevant match for the AI agent development requirement. Strong testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses) and cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) align well. Gaps are mostly framework-specific: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest/Playwright mentions, though adjacent experience suggests fast ramp-up.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience with production systems at scale
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work directly matches a hard-to-find requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, authored testing libraries, taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework in the stack
Kotlin and Python are not listed among skills; Java exposure appears dated
Frontend framework history leans Ember.js; React depth is less evidenced than backend work

key_factors.factor: TypeScript/Node.js full-stack depth beyond required 6 years
